security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:5173; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Scan, mix and export Agent Skills to AI coding tools
bundle.longDescription: AgentMix is a local, open-source desktop tool to scan, pick and compose Agent Skills from any project and export them to AI coding tools. v0.1 Alpha targets Windows and Claude Code project-level export.
